title: zollikoferiastrum brassicifolium
side_effects: Zollikoferiastrum brassicifolium can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, nausea, and diarrhea due to the high concentration of alkaloids in the plant. Overconsumption of the plant can also lead to headaches, dizziness, and fatigue, potentially exacerbating underlying health conditions like hypertension and cardiovascular disease. In severe cases, improper use of Zollikoferiastrum brassicifolium may cause allergic reactions, respiratory distress, or even organ damage. It is essential to consult with a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using the plant for medicinal purposes to avoid such side effects.
